title: 000.jar
description: you are in a Minecraft Arg with a new entity
body: **000.jar** =========== _Something went wrong **in your world**, someone else came before you, and they're out to get you. Can you avoid it?_ A corrupt entity invaded your world. You need to avoid him because he will do everything he can to kick you out of your own game. Hide, wait, don't look for it or things will get worse. ### **What's new with this mod?** #### This is a horror mod focused on the player exploring the environment, they are not random scares or creatures chasing you like typical Dwellers. This mod wants to focus on giving the feeling that the old versions of Minecraft gave. Without bothering the player but giving them the feeling that something is not right. The player has the decision whether to advance or not. It is an environmental and psychological mod with surprises that the player will have to experience. The events are completely random and configurable to the player's taste.   ### **What is recommended to play this mod and have a good experience?** I recommend having textures and sounds from Minecraft Alpha or Beta. Classic mods like Herobrine to give more tension and atmosphere. Play it in singleplayer, play it patiently and explore. If you are not comfortable with the default configuration, you can change it to your liking and reset it whenever you want. It is compatible with multiplayer servers (tested by the community itself in previous versions) and there are almost no bugs or errors that can happen with the mod. ### Necessary for the mod to work correctly: Click here for Download Geckolib Mod (for animations, etc) Click here for Download Configured Mod (for the mod config menu)   You can uninstall it whenever you want, it will not corrupt or affect your world. If you have problems or doubts, suggestions, you can contact me through the Discord server: Click me   PATREON ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Do you want to have early access to features, leaks of this or other mods that I am making and have many other benefits? You can join by being a paying member on my Patreon. After joining make sure to also join my Discord server to give you your respective role. If you are a developer you can publish your mod on the server so people can try it. **[https://www.patreon.com/EBALIA](https://www.patreon.com/EBALIA)** Credits: Phenomal, VantablackDEV (deep testing) riverr (sounds) https://www.mado-hosting.com/?ref=ebaliakmzl ![https://www.mado-hosting.com](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94e834766293ed8172447ea8dc6263889382f9a9.png)
